entities.label: Brewbarry
entities.summary: Goliath Barbarian unjustly exiled from his Uthgardt tribe who bears the Dragon Slayer Sword and is fiercely loyal to Vukradin.

entities.label: Valphine
entities.summary: A drow Cleric of Lathander who founded the Temple of Lathander's Searing Pain of Justice and operates in morally grey contexts.

entities.label: Soma
entities.summary: Tortle Druid of the Circle of the Moon who bears Meril's awakened staff and has shifted from naturalism to interventionism.

entities.label: Vukradin
entities.summary: Aasimar Bard and principled idealist who dreams of building a music studio through conflict-free gold and holds a seat on Phandalin's Privy Council.

entities.label: Corbin
entities.summary: A former bandit and farmer whose village was destroyed, now serving as a reluctant party retainer.

entities.label: Boney
entities.summary: Undead skeletal horse from the Dragon Barrow who is bonded to Soma, believing her to be Lady Alagondar reincarnated.

entities.label: Ser Kaelen
entities.summary: Order of the Gauntlet field recruiter and party handler in Phandalin who cultivates Vukradin as an Order asset while managing the statue delivery as a fundraising opportunity.

entities.label: Harbin Wester
entities.summary: Cowardly but politically savvy Townmaster of Phandalin who established the Privy Council and takes public credit for the party's victories.

entities.label: Adabra
entities.summary: Anti-interventionist Emerald Enclave naturalist and midwife who was outvoted at the druid council but left without accepting the verdict and is now mobilizing allies against the party.

entities.label: Linene Graywind
entities.summary: Manager of the Lionshield Coster outpost in Phandalin whose bosses have strong interest in planar phenomena.

entities.label: Toblen Stonehill
entities.summary: Friendly innkeeper of the Stonehill Inn in Phandalin who pays Vukradin for performances and runs betting pools on party survival.

entities.label: Daran Edermath
entities.summary: Retired half-elf adventurer who tends an orchard near Phandalin and initially told the party about the cursed lighthouse.

entities.label: Brin Bundlewine
entities.summary: Founding lay congregant of the Temple of Lathander's Searing Pain of Justice who is renovating Tresendar Manor and conducted a public self-flagellation parade.

entities.label: Giles Slipper-Shine
entities.summary: Founding lay congregant of the Temple of Lathander's Searing Pain of Justice who is renovating Tresendar Manor alongside Brin Bundlewine.

entities.label: Elmar Barthen
entities.summary: Friendly proprietor of Barthen's Provisions in Phandalin who introduced the party to Falcon the Hunter.

entities.label: Qelline Alderleaf
entities.summary: Farmer near Phandalin who was abandoned by Alphonse the night before their wedding and currently lets Petunia graze on her land for 5sp/week.

entities.label: Alphonse "Big Al" Kalazorn
entities.summary: Retired Sheriff of Triboar and owner of the destroyed Butterskull Ranch who was rescued by the party and is now reconciling with Qelline Alderleaf.

entities.label: Lyra
entities.summary: Low-ranking Emerald Enclave leader restored to full good standing after the druid council voted in favor of interventionism.

entities.label: Thomas
entities.summary: An Emerald Enclave agent loyal to Lyra who was freed from Kraken Society mind control by the party.

entities.label: Marian
entities.summary: An Emerald Enclave agent loyal to Lyra who was freed from Kraken Society mind control by the party.

entities.label: Zeleen Varnaster
entities.summary: Wererat leader of the Whiskered Gang who contracted to protect Mountain's Toe Gold Mine and was dispatched to retrieve the Earthstone Gem.

entities.label: Horia Stonetallow
entities.summary: Leader of five shield dwarves at Mountain's Toe Gold Mine who killed Don-Jon Raskin and secretly arranged a fake gem contingency with Brewbarry.

entities.label: Dwolin the Grout
entities.summary: Mine foreman at Mountain's Toe Gold Mine who refuses to work without the Earthstone Gem.

entities.label: Dazlyn Grayshard
entities.summary: Grateful dwarf at the Dwarven Excavation ruins who offered sending stones as a reward to the party.

entities.label: Norbus Ironrune
entities.summary: Grateful dwarf at the Dwarven Excavation ruins who survived the orc attack thanks to the party's warning.

entities.label: Teega the Smith
entities.summary: Former Kraken Society mind-control victim who is recovering and showing signs of ideological wavering after observing Valphine's church.

entities.label: Falcon the Hunter
entities.summary: Retired adventurer whose dragonslayer persona is a fabrication; his lodge was seized by Anchorites of Talos and he is now en route to Phandalin seeking reconciliation with Vukradin.

entities.label: Sridar
entities.summary: Drow artifact collector who purchased the Talisman of Moesko and offered future collaboration on planar artifact analysis.

entities.label: Martisha Vinetalker
entities.summary: Stern and charismatic half-elf owner of the Wayside Inn at the intersection of the High Road and Triboar Trail.

entities.label: Xanth
entities.summary: Centaur and old friend of Meril who publicly validated Soma's stewardship of the staff and offered to guide the party to the Anchorites' ritual standing stones.

entities.label: Sister Kaella
entities.summary: Deadly assassin-priest and former Carver spymaster who killed Corbin and escaped custody; her whereabouts are unknown.

entities.label: Jenna
entities.summary: Lord's Alliance operative in Phandalin who failed to recruit Vukradin and suppresses public knowledge of the Kraken Society.

entities.label: Don-Jon Raskin
entities.summary: Deceased mine overseer hired by a Neverwinter consortium who was killed by the Stonetallow dwarves after revealing plans to exploit them.

entities.label: Meril
entities.summary: Soma's druidic mentor who trained her for one year before bequeathing his awakened staff and departing; old friend of Xanth the centaur.

entities.label: Lord Cassian Meliame
entities.summary: Eccentric Neverwinter noble hosting a gala which Elara Seasong Meliame is attending.

entities.label: Elara Seasong Meliame
entities.summary: Wealthy art collector in Neverwinter who is the rightful owner of the blue quartz mermaid statue and is currently attending Lord Cassian Meliame's gala.

entities.label: Aletra
entities.summary: Valphine's drow sister who smuggles Midnight Tears poison through the multiverse and escaped Axeholm through a self-opened portal after being blinded by Valphine.

entities.label: Lady Alagondar
entities.summary: Ghost who appeared at the Dragon Barrow after the Dragon Slayer Sword was retrieved and pointed sorrowfully toward the Ice Spire Mountains.

entities.label: Cryovain
entities.summary: White dragon who terrorized the region around Phandalin and was killed by the party on the rooftop of Icespire Hold.

entities.label: The Carver
entities.summary: Destroyed alien intelligence that inhabited an obsidian sword and attempted to dominate Cryovain; dissipated when the dragon was killed at Icespire Hold.

entities.label: Moesko
entities.summary: Anchorite of Talos who occupied the Tower of Storms and was killed by Soma; his heart was subsequently destroyed by Vukradin.

entities.label: Borg the Hammer
entities.summary: Deceased half-orc enforcer who destroyed Butterskull Ranch and led the ambush there; killed by the party.

entities.label: Jax
entities.summary: Deceased lieutenant of the Carver who led the ambush at the Dragon Barrow clearing; killed by the party.

entities.label: Sylvine Wintermoon
entities.summary: Bandit and con artist who researched Vukradin's reputation to exploit it, attacked the party at Icespire Hold, and fled after being defeated.

entities.label: Runa
entities.summary: Sylvine Wintermoon's sister and fellow Stone-Cold Reaver whose fate after the Icespire Hold skirmish is unknown.

entities.label: Delaan Winterhound
entities.summary: Emerald Enclave figure who brought a Treant army into the War of the Dragons at Malfire Morazana's urging.

entities.label: Lord Neverember
entities.summary: Lord of Neverwinter pursuing progressive reforms who authorized tax-free plunder for adventurers pacifying the hinterland.

entities.label: Milo Goodbarrel
entities.summary: Order of the Gauntlet hero who led the strike force that stopped the Tiamat ritual during the War of the Dragon.

entities.label: The Chief Accountant
entities.summary: An Axeholm ghost whose spirit was put to rest after all accounts were settled.

entities.label: Shrimpy
entities.summary: Captured orc prisoner displaced from the Ice Spire who was delivered to Harbin Wester for imprisonment in Phandalin.

entities.label: King Gnerkli
entities.summary: Co-ruler of Gnomengarde who was freed from crisis paralysis and rewarded the party with the Hat of Wizardry.

entities.label: King Korboz
entities.summary: Co-ruler of Gnomengarde whose sanity was restored after the mimic was killed, though he now argues with Gnerkli over seniority.

entities.label: Fibblestib
entities.summary: Enthusiastic gnome inventor at Gnomengarde who leads gnomish invention projects.

entities.label: Dabbledob
entities.summary: Enthusiastic gnome inventor at Gnomengarde who noted music has helped in some circumstances.

entities.label: Backes Dunfield
entities.summary: Staff member at the Wayside Inn on the corner of the High Road and Triboar Trail.

entities.label: Cooragh Struckt
entities.summary: Staff member at the Wayside Inn on the corner of the High Road and Triboar Trail.

entities.label: Miral
entities.summary: Sea elf banshee at the Tower of Storms whose spirit was laid to rest after the party returned her opalescent conch.

entities.label: Pog
entities.summary: A Gnomengarde gnome guard who granted the party entry after debate.

entities.label: Ulla
entities.summary: A Gnomengarde gnome guard who granted the party entry alongside Pog.

entities.label: Facktoré
entities.summary: Gnomengarde inventor who fled after the party disabled her autoloading crossbow; current status uncertain.

entities.label: Skippy
entities.summary: A captured bandit who surrendered and was last seen at a remote camp with Corbin.

entities.label: Jarek
entities.summary: The groom who accompanied Elara the merchant and heard a non-auditory mental hum before an orc ambush.

entities.label: Elara (merchant)
entities.summary: A merchant rescued by the party from an orc attack who rewarded Valphine with gold on behalf of Lathander.

entities.label: The Cult Fanatic
entities.summary: A deceased Kraken Society operative who mind-controlled the Emerald Enclave patrol and spoke of a 'rising current toward Neverwinter.'

entities.label: Halia Thornton
entities.summary: The manager of Phandalin's Miner's Exchange and active Privy Council member.

entities.label: Garaele
entities.summary: A Phandalin resident near the Shrine of Luck who has not been directly interacted with recently.

entities.label: Order of the Gauntlet
entities.summary: Depleted knightly faction opposing evil that relies on true believers and is allegedly funded in part by House Margaster.

entities.label: Emerald Enclave
entities.summary: Druidic organization split between an interventionist faction led by Lyra and an anti-interventionist naturalist faction led by Adabra.

entities.label: Lord's Alliance
entities.summary: Political faction maintaining law and order under Lord Neverember that uses adventurers as proxies and suppresses knowledge of the Kraken Society.

entities.label: Kraken Society
entities.summary: Secretive psionic organization seeking to access the drowned gate beneath Yllyn and expand its influence toward Neverwinter.

entities.label: Cult of Talos
entities.summary: Shapeshifting Anchorites of Talos conducting dark rites at the Circle of Thunder and occupying Falcon the Hunter's Lodge.

entities.label: House Margaster
entities.summary: Waterdhavian noble house with alleged ties to evil cults that allegedly funds the Order of the Gauntlet and is actively moving to intercept the mermaid statue.

entities.label: House Sartorra
entities.summary: A drow criminal organization running interdimensional poison trafficking through the multiverse, with Aletra as a field operative.

entities.label: Stonetallow Clan
entities.summary: Shield dwarf mining clan led by Horia Stonetallow that handles all mining at Mountain's Toe Gold Mine under a 20% contract.

entities.label: Whiskered Gang
entities.summary: Wererat gang led by Zeleen Varnaster that contracted to protect Mountain's Toe Gold Mine in exchange for shelter and cheese shipments.

entities.label: Meliame Family
entities.summary: Wealthy art collectors in Neverwinter including Lord Cassian and Elara Seasong Meliame, rightful recipients of the blue quartz mermaid statue.

entities.label: Phandalin Privy Council
entities.summary: Phandalin's newly formed governing body chaired by Harbin Wester and including Vukradin among its members.

entities.label: Stone-Cold Reavers
entities.summary: A mercenary company led by Sylvine Wintermoon that challenged the party for the dragon hoard at Icespire Hold.

entities.label: Rot-Tusk Clan
entities.summary: Ogres in an ongoing blood feud with the party after multiple of their members were killed in various encounters.

entities.label: Black Lion Tribe
entities.summary: An Uthgardt tribe that destroyed Corbin's village of Greenmeadow and killed his family.

entities.label: Lionshield Coster
entities.summary: A trading company with a Phandalin outpost managed by Linene Graywind whose leadership has strong interest in planar phenomena.

entities.label: Druidic Conclave
entities.summary: Adabra's mobilized gathering of druid allies formally challenging Soma's custody of Meril's Staff.

entities.label: Phandalin
entities.summary: Small mining town in the Sword Mountain foothills governed by a Privy Council; the party's home base and site of the Temple of Lathander.

entities.label: Neverwinter
entities.summary: Major city under Lord Neverember's reforming governance and the party's current destination for the statue delivery and gala.

entities.label: Icespire Hold
entities.summary: Mountain fortress that was Cryovain's lair where the Carver attempted to dominate the dragon; contains a frozen treasure hoard and an unexplored secret door.

entities.label: Mountain's Toe Gold Mine
entities.summary: Gold mine 15 miles NE of Phandalin in which the party holds a financial stake; currently idle pending retrieval of the Earthstone Gem.

entities.label: Tresendar Manor
entities.summary: Former manor in Phandalin converted by Valphine into the Temple of Lathander's Searing Pain of Justice.

entities.label: Whispering Grove
entities.summary: A grove in the Whispering Wood where a planar rift expanded after a failed sealing ritual and an unknown entity harvests materials.

entities.label: Axeholm
entities.summary: Ancient dwarven fortress south of Phandalin secured by the party as a last-resort refuge after clearing planar anomalies caused by Aletra's Spatial Rectification Calliope.

entities.label: Dragon Barrow
entities.summary: Ancient burial mound where the party retrieved the Dragon Slayer Sword, defeated will-o'-wisps, and encountered Lady Alagondar's ghost.

entities.label: Tower of Storms
entities.summary: Lighthouse on the coast where Moesko's curse was lifted; its ships were salvaged for the mermaid statue and other treasures.

entities.label: Woodland Manse
entities.summary: Forest stronghold currently occupied by the Cult of Talos from which the party was driven away by fireballs and lightning.

entities.label: Circle of Thunder
entities.summary: Standing-stone ritual site atop a cave-ridden hill in Neverwinter Wood where Anchorites of Talos perform dark rites; location provided by Xanth.

entities.label: Falcon's Hunting Lodge
entities.summary: Falcon the Hunter's former lodge now occupied by Anchorites of Talos after a Gorthok-related counterattack.

entities.label: Gnomengarde
entities.summary: Gnomish hold in the Sword Mountains caves ruled by the destabilized dual monarchy of Korboz and Gnerkli.

entities.label: Umbrage Hill
entities.summary: Hilltop location of Adabra's stone windmill where the party killed a manticore and convinced Adabra to return to Phandalin.

entities.label: Wayside Inn
entities.summary: Inn at the intersection of the High Road and Triboar Trail staffed by Martisha Vinetalker, where Teega the Smith intends to return.

entities.label: Shrine of Savras
entities.summary: Former home of the Whiskered Gang now occupied by approximately 16 orcs and several ogres, suggested as a source of dragon intelligence.

entities.label: Butterskull Ranch
entities.summary: Alphonse "Big Al" Kalazorn's ranch that was burned down by Borg the Hammer; Alphonse and Petunia were rescued from it.

entities.label: Drowned Gate beneath Yllyn
entities.summary: An Underdark location described in a stolen inscription that the Kraken Society's rogue faction seeks to excavate.

entities.label: Stonehill Inn
entities.summary: Inn in Phandalin run by Toblen Stonehill where the party regularly stays and Vukradin performs music.

entities.label: Temple of Abbathor Ruins
entities.summary: Ancient dwarven excavation ruins southwest of Phandalin where Dazlyn Grayshard and Norbus Ironrune are working.

entities.label: Druid Conclave Defense
entities.summary: An urgent plot where Adabra mobilizes druidic allies to formally challenge Soma's custody of Meril's Staff at a conclave.

entities.label: Earthstone Gem Recovery
entities.summary: An urgent plot to recover the Earthstone Gem from orc-controlled territory so Mountain's Toe Mine can resume operations.

entities.label: Whispering Grove Planar Rift
entities.summary: A high-priority plot involving an expanding planar rift being exploited by an unknown entity harvesting materials from the grove.

entities.label: Woodland Manse Clearance
entities.summary: A high-priority quest to eradicate the Anchorites of Talos from the Woodland Manse accepted twice by the party.

entities.label: Circle of Thunder Investigation
entities.summary: A high-priority quest to disrupt dark rites performed by half-orc Anchorites of Talos at a standing stone circle.

entities.label: Kraken Society Drowned Gate Operation
entities.summary: An elevated threat plot involving the Kraken Society's attempt to excavate a drowned gate beneath Yllyn in the Underdark.

entities.label: Blue Quartz Mermaid Statue Delivery
entities.summary: A moderate quest to deliver a recovered statue to Elara Seasong Meliame in Neverwinter before House Margaster agents intercept it.

entities.label: Aletra / House Sartorra Retaliation
entities.summary: A moderate threat plot involving Aletra's escape and her unnamed boss's likely retaliation against the party for disrupting the poison operation.

entities.label: Planar Distortion Score
entities.summary: Threat tracker measuring regional planar instability, currently estimated at 7 with next threshold at 9.

entities.label: Kraken Society Echoes Score
entities.summary: A HIGH threat tracker measuring the Kraken Society's expanding influence and progress toward the drowned gate operation.

entities.label: Cult of Talos Score
entities.summary: An ELEVATED threat tracker measuring the Anchorites' progress toward completing their ritual at the Circle of Thunder.

entities.label: Druidic Conclave Pressure Score
entities.summary: A RISING threat tracker measuring Adabra's progress toward holding a formal conclave vote on Soma's staff custody.

entities.label: Aletra / House Sartorra Score
entities.summary: An ACTIVE threat tracker measuring House Sartorra's likely retaliation for the lost poison cargo and destroyed planar machine.

entities.label: Zeleen Performance Score
entities.summary: An UNCERTAIN tracker measuring whether the Whiskered Gang will successfully retrieve the Earthstone Gem from orc territory.

entities.label: Iymrith / Blue Dragon Score
entities.summary: A LATENT threat tracker measuring whether the Cult of Talos will acquire Iymrith artifacts and the dragon will resurface.

entities.label: Valphine Sotorra
entities.summary: Drow Cleric of Lathander who founded the Temple of Lathander's Searing Pain of Justice and operates with covert drow political instincts.

entities.label: Aldric Stone Path
entities.summary: Adabra's most loyal Emerald Enclave ally who was publicly discredited at the council when he could not answer Soma's challenge on substance.

entities.label: Corbin
entities.summary: Former bandit recruited as a party retainer who was killed by Sister Kaella while guarding her.

entities.label: Locutus
entities.summary: Deceased operative involved in Borg the Hammer's assassination plot who was killed by Sister Kaella.

entities.label: Reidoth
entities.summary: Nominal head of the local Emerald Enclave chapter whose deliberate absence was exploited by Adabra to stack the council vote.

entities.label: Grundar Quartzvein
entities.summary: True leader of the Svirfneblin rebellion who seeks to retrieve his brother Brundar from the Demonweb Pits; his brother was imprisoned there by House Sotorra.

entities.label: Anchorites of Talos
entities.summary: Shapeshifting cultists of Talos who occupy the Woodland Manse and Falcon the Hunter's Lodge and are blighting Neverwinter Wood.

entities.label: House Sotorra
entities.summary: Drow noble house that operates illegal interdimensional Midnight Tears poison trade and imprisoned Grundar Quartzvein's brother in the Demonweb Pits.

entities.label: Rot-Tusk Ogres
entities.summary: Ogre tribe that holds a blood feud against the party after losing several members to them.

entities.label: Temple of Lathander's Searing Pain of Justice
entities.summary: Pain-focused Lathanderite temple founded by Valphine at Tresendar Manor in Phandalin with Brin Bundlewine and Giles Slipper-Shine as founding congregants.

entities.label: Privy Council of Phandalin
entities.summary: Governing council of Phandalin established by Harbin Wester with members including Vukradin, Toblen, Barthen, Halia, Linene, and Adabra.

entities.label: Mountain's Toe Gold Mine Operation
entities.summary: Tripartite mine operation involving the party (Don-Jon's share), the Stonetallow dwarves (mining), and the Whiskered Gang (protection) that is currently idle awaiting the Earthstone Gem.

entities.label: Whispering Wood / Whispering Grove
entities.summary: Forest afflicted by an expanding planar rift where the ritual to seal the rift failed and a phased puppet-creature has been observed harvesting materials.

entities.label: Falcon the Hunter's Hunting Lodge
entities.summary: Retired adventurer's lodge currently overrun by Anchorites of Talos and their orc allies.

entities.label: Druid Council Grove
entities.summary: Glade where the Emerald Enclave council convened, ruled in favor of interventionism, and restored Lyra to good standing.

entities.label: Neverwinter Wood
entities.summary: Forest overrun by orcs allied with Anchorites of Talos where dark rites are performed at standing stones and farmers are being displaced.

entities.label: Leilon
entities.summary: Coastal settlement referenced in Miral's warning that 'the true storm gathers not in the sky, but in the depths below Leilon.'

entities.label: Yllyn
entities.summary: Location in the Underdark containing a 'drowned gate' that is the primary target of the Kraken Society's regional operations.

entities.label: Glacier of Whispers
entities.summary: Violet glacier with silent screaming faces trapped in ice that emits psychic pressure; the Carver's trail crossed it.

entities.label: Dwarven Excavation
entities.summary: Ruins near Phandalin where Dazlyn Grayshard and Norbus Ironrune were warned about Cryovain and defended from an orc attack by the party.

entities.label: Statue Delivery to Elara Seasong Meliame
entities.summary: The party must deliver the blue quartz mermaid statue to Elara at Lord Cassian Meliame's gala in Neverwinter while evading House Margaster interception agents.

entities.label: Kraken Society / Drowned Gate Beneath Yllyn
entities.summary: The Kraken Society seeks to access the drowned gate beneath Yllyn in the Underdark while expanding psionic recruitment on the Sword Coast.

entities.label: Anchorites of Talos Threat
entities.summary: The Anchorites of Talos occupy the Woodland Manse and Falcon's Lodge, perform dark rites in Neverwinter Wood, and must be eradicated to save farming communities.

entities.label: Mountain's Toe Earthstone Gem
entities.summary: The Whiskered Gang has been dispatched to retrieve the Earthstone Gem from an orc-controlled forest so the gold mine can resume operations.

entities.label: Sister Kaella at Large
entities.summary: Sister Kaella escaped custody after killing Corbin and her whereabouts and intentions are unknown, posing a continued threat especially to Valphine.

entities.label: Planar Rift at Whispering Grove
entities.summary: The failed sealing ritual worsened the planar rift at Whispering Grove; a phased puppet-creature directed by an unknown intelligence is harvesting materials there.

entities.label: Aletra at Large
entities.summary: Valphine's drow sister escaped Axeholm and continues smuggling Midnight Tears poison for an unnamed boss while recovering from her blinding.

entities.label: Adabra's Opposition
entities.summary: Adabra was politically defeated at the Emerald Enclave council but left without accepting the verdict and is now mobilizing druid allies against the party on a different battlefield.

entities.label: Frozen Treasure Hoard at Icespire Hold
entities.summary: Approximately 3,000 gp is fused in ice and residium from Cryovain's hoard and requires a planar theorist to separate; Vukradin is tracking the ethical obligation to find rightful owners.

entities.label: Woodland Manse Eradication
entities.summary: The party retreated from the Woodland Manse under overwhelming force and the Cult of Talos still controls it; the quest remains incomplete.

entities.label: Falcon the Hunter's Lodge Reclamation
entities.summary: The party has a standing offer to reclaim Falcon's lodge from the Anchorites of Talos in exchange for special wood for Vukradin's studio and a music venue partnership.

entities.label: Zax Unaccounted For
entities.summary: Zax, one of the Carver's three lieutenants, is unaccounted for and their status and location remain unknown.

entities.label: Brundar's Echo / Grundar Quartzvein
entities.summary: Grundar Quartzvein seeks to retrieve his brother Brundar from the Demonweb Pits where he was imprisoned by House Sotorra; the arc has not yet activated.

entities.label: Miral's Warning — Storm Below Leilon
entities.summary: The banshee Miral warned that the true storm gathers in the depths below Leilon; this threat has not been investigated.

entities.label: Meril's Staff Mystery
entities.summary: Meril's staff is losing leaves while gaining power and Meril's current location and the reason he chose Soma after only one year of training remain unexplained.

entities.label: Rightful Owners of Shipwreck Treasures
entities.summary: Candlekeep research identified the owners of shipwreck treasures recovered from the Tower of Storms but the return process is described as not straightforward.

entities.label: House Margaster / Order of the Gauntlet Letter
entities.summary: An anonymous letter from Jenna alleges the Order of the Gauntlet accepts funding from House Margaster, which has rumored cult connections; the claim is unverified.

entities.label: Obsidian Sword Rightful Owner
entities.summary: Vukradin holds the Carver's obsidian sword with its mental amplifier gem and insists on returning it to its rightful owner, whose identity has not yet been confirmed in sessions.

entities.label: Kraken Society Echoes
entities.summary: Threat tracker measuring Kraken Society encroachment, currently estimated at 6–7 with next threshold at 8.

entities.label: Brundar's Echo
entities.summary: Threat tracker for Grundar Quartzvein's revenge arc, currently at 0 with no in-play activity detected yet.

entities.label: Talosian Threat Score
entities.summary: Threat tracker measuring Anchorites of Talos escalation, currently estimated at 4–5 with next threshold at 6.

entities.label: Searing Dawn
entities.summary: Valphine's personal arc score tracking her spreading of Lathander's pain-as-purification doctrine, currently estimated at 14+.

entities.label: Meril's Legacy
entities.summary: Soma's personal arc score tracking her growth as a discerning interventionist worthy of Meril's staff, currently estimated at 7–8.

entities.label: Thistle's Echo
entities.summary: Brewbarry's personal arc score tracking his paranoid Uthgardt instincts and tendency to shatter illusions through brute force.
